The '''Medal of Destiny''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] pilot medal awarded for successfully gaining the upper hand in an [[Arms Race|arms race]], which was won by the Empire when Admiral [[Demetrius Zaarin|Zaarin]] acquired new weapon technologies (such as the beam weapon system).

==Design==
Like most TIE pilot medals, the ribbons were colored with red and blue stripes. The medal itself was arrowhead-shaped, and had a gold wedge at the center.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
